changes.summary: Optional block set for WhatsApp contact columns (column_name, type). Changing this attribute forces replacement. At least one of phone_columns, email_columns, or whats_app_columns must be configured.
Now documented as required when both email_columns and whats_app_columns are empty.
Now documented as required when both phone_columns and whats_app_columns are empty.
Flow export jobs now include the published flow version when available, targeting the correct published revision.
Flow listing and export operations retry more reliably when the API rate-limits requests or returns transient export job failures.
